briefs.title: Council to Consider: Proposed Mandatory Building Energy Reporting for BC Commercial Properties
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to review the Building Benchmark BC 2024 Annual Report, which calls on the BC provincial government to make energy benchmarking — tracking how much energy a building uses — mandatory for large commercial and multi-family buildings starting in 2026.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage a large commercial building, prepare to track and report your building's energy use.

key_dates.label: BC mandatory building energy benchmarking proposed start year — buildings over 200,000 sqft

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Retail
